components.name: Button
components.description: Button — primary action control. Type: primary / secondary / ghost. State: default / hover / disabled. (React: components/Button)

components.name: Input
components.description: Input — text field with optional label and helper/error text. State: default / focus / error. (React: components/Input)

components.name: Badge
components.description: Badge — small status pill for inline labels. Variant: success / danger / neutral. (React: components/Badge)

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: NavLink — navigation anchor with active-state underline. State: default / active. (React: components/NavLink)

components.name: Card/Default
components.description: Card — surface container with optional media, title, body, and footer/link. No variants. (React: components/Card)

components.name: Section/Navbar
components.description: Navbar — top navigation band; composes NavLink + Button. Props: brand, links, ctaLabel. (React: sections/Navbar)

components.name: Section/Hero
components.description: Hero — top-of-page marketing block; composes Button. Props: eyebrow, title, subtitle, primaryCta, secondaryCta. (React: sections/Hero)

components.name: Section/Feature Row
components.description: FeatureRow — three-up feature grid; composes Card. Props: title, subtitle, features[]. (React: sections/FeatureRow)

components.name: Section/Footer
components.description: Footer — page footer with link row + copyright. Props: links[], copyright. (React: sections/Footer)

components.name: Section/CTA Band
components.description: CtaBand — closing call-to-action with email capture; composes Input + Button. Props: title, subtitle, placeholder, ctaLabel. (React: sections/CtaBand)
